Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Temporal Field]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — The Temporal Field is a technique that slows the world around the user.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — The Temporal Field interferes with camera footage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — The Temporal Field can provide warnings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — A Temporal Field can alter a being's relationship to time, allowing them to move faster than others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — The Temporal Field realigns the user's relationship to time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Starhammer possesses a Temporal Field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — The Temporal Field is a technique that can be used to manipulate relative time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The original Temporal Field was built by a deceased Aether Technician.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Under the effects of a Temporal Field, anything personally interacted with becomes subject to the user's actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — The Temporal Field is an Aether-dependent system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Temporal Field is a technique used by Sola.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — The Temporal Field is considered a piece of masterwork Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Temporal Field is an ability engaged by Sola's clones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Temporal Fields can stop time around a target.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Mell cannot pilot Starhammer during the activation of the Temporal Field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Sola engaged her Temporal Field to freeze time.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
